name: Unified P2P - 07 Item and Catalog Onboarding (Single, Implicit Auto-create, Bulk, Approve, Lifecycle)

nodes.name: Create item (form, PENDING_ONBOARDING)
nodes.documentation: Buyer/Engineer (permission items.create; Engineering conditional for eng items) creates the item via the module form. FIELDS: code (string, AUTO-generated, pattern DEPARTMENT/SEGMENT_CODE/SUB_SEGMENT_CODE/RUNNING_NUMBER e.g. ME/SG/SSG/000001; runningNumber = 6-digit zero-padded, max+1 parsed from existing codes (0 if none), generated in a transaction race-safe; uniqueness on (runningNumber, code); dept codes {ME|EL|AD|CP|SR|IT}, fallback DEP; segment/sub-segment default SG/SSG; configurable); shortDescription (text, mandatory); description (text, AUTO-populated = segmentDesc + subSegmentDesc + shortDescription, fallback to item code); segment (reference to Segment master, default SG); subSegment (reference, default SSG); stockUom (dropdown from UoM master, mandatory); purchaseUom (dropdown from UoM master, mandatory); hsCode (string, optional, HS tariff code - AB, for import classification/duty); category / finishedProductCategory (reference, optional, for spend reporting); standardSupplierId (reference to Supplier, optional, NULLABLE - need NOT be ONBOARDED, any existing id or null accepted); status = PENDING_ONBOARDING (default). [SCOR OE4 | source: RA item code/description + AB HS code + data-model Item]

nodes.name: Set source priority (unique per item)
nodes.documentation: Buyer sets the item's ItemSourcePriority set. FIELDS per entry: priority (number, ordering); sourceType (dropdown, value set {MANUFACTURED | PURCHASED | SUBCONTRACTED | STOCK_TRANSFER}). CONSTRAINTS: unique (itemId, priority) AND unique (itemId, sourceType) - each source type appears at most once per item; the set is REPLACED wholesale on update (not merged). Defines how the item is normally obtained, driving downstream make-vs-buy and PO type. [SCOR OE4 | source: RA ItemSourcePriority unique constraints + data-model]

nodes.name: Request approval (PENDING_ONBOARDING -> PENDING_APPROVAL)
nodes.documentation: Buyer submits the item for approval (permission items.update). GUARD: status MUST be PENDING_ONBOARDING (wrong status -> BadRequestException, record unchanged). On success: status PENDING_ONBOARDING -> PENDING_APPROVAL; ITEM_APPROVAL_REQUESTED notification emitted (ONLY here, carries getItemCode(code, runningNumber)); audit category ADMIN (no dedicated item audit category). [SCOR OE4 | source: RA item request-approval guard]

nodes.name: Approve item (PENDING_APPROVAL -> ONBOARDED)
nodes.documentation: Approver (permission item.approve; Admin always; Engineering conditional for eng items) approves. GUARD: status MUST be PENDING_APPROVAL (else BadRequestException). On success: status PENDING_APPROVAL -> ONBOARDED. No notification at approve (only at request-approval). The item is now orderable and selectable on requisitions/POs. [SCOR OE4 | source: RA item.approve guard]

nodes.name: Edit item (reverts to PENDING_APPROVAL)
nodes.documentation: Buyer/Engineer edits an ONBOARDED item (permission items.update). RULE: ONBOARDED or PENDING_APPROVAL -> recomputed to PENDING_APPROVAL; PENDING_ONBOARDING stays. isErpSynced reset to false. The ItemSourcePriority set is replaced wholesale if changed. Re-enters the approval path (back to RequestApproval). [source: RA edit-reverts-to-pending]

nodes.name: Offboard / suspend item
nodes.documentation: Buyer/Admin offboards (permission item.offboard) or suspends the item. GUARD: offboard requires status = ONBOARDED. EFFECT: OFFBOARDED is TERMINAL (soft-delete; retained for history + referencing requisition lines/POs; no documented reactivation); SUSPENDED blocks new ordering but is reversible on resolution. No notification at offboard/suspend. Audit category ADMIN. [SCOR OE4 | ISO 7.5 retention | source: RA item.offboard guard + review SUSPENDED]

nodes.name: Upload item import file
nodes.documentation: BULK branch. Buyer/Admin uploads an XLSX/CSV of items (permission items.import). Same generic import pipeline as all masters. Parsed: file readable? sheet present? has data rows? [source: RA bulk import + platform-services 7]

nodes.name: Mark onboarded, optional ERP sync
nodes.documentation: System finalizes the ONBOARDED item. ERP-sync toggle (isErpSynced) allowed ONLY when ONBOARDED; toggling pushes the item master to the external system of record (boundary integration). Any later edit reverts status to PENDING_APPROVAL and resets isErpSynced = false. Audit (category ADMIN) + SSE emitted. [SCOR OE4 integration boundary | source: RA lifecycle + platform-services 13]

nodes.name: Detect non-UUID requisition line itemId
nodes.documentation: IMPLICIT branch. When a requisition is saved (Diagram 02), the System inspects each line itemId: if it is a UUID -> lookup the existing item (404 rejects the whole op); if it is a free-typed string (non-UUID) -> AUTO-CREATE with NO lookup. Supplier and item auto-create paths run in parallel and join before linking + postValueSync. [source: RA e05 auto-create from non-UUID + raphe-edge-cases]

nodes.name: Auto-create item from line (PENDING_ONBOARDING)
nodes.documentation: System auto-creates the item from the requisition line: description = the free-typed string; stockUom + purchaseUom = the line UoM; code generated DEP/SG/SSG/000001-style (6-digit running, race-safe in transaction); status = PENDING_ONBOARDING (unapproved); no source priority required at creation. The unapproved item is usable on the requisition immediately but flows through the standard approval path to become ONBOARDED. [source: RA e05 + raphe-supplier-item-onboarding]

nodes.name: Validate header + rows (accumulate all errors)
nodes.documentation: System validates: exact header (no missing/extra columns, order-insensitive); iterate rows (header = row 1, first data = row 2); per row validate fields/types/enums + resolve foreign refs by natural key; ITEM IMPORT validates every standardSupplierCode resolves (else whole import fails); ACCUMULATE ALL row errors (never fail-fast). Natural key for upsert = code (new items get incremented runningNumber + generated code). [source: RA bulk import e06 + raphe-bulk-import]

nodes.name: Upsert by code in one transaction (PENDING_ONBOARDING)
nodes.documentation: System opens ONE transaction, upserts each row by natural key code (match -> update; else create with generated code + incremented runningNumber). Duplicate keys within one file resolve last-wins. Commit-all or roll-back-all (late DB failure rolls back fully, audit NOT emitted). Imported items default PENDING_ONBOARDING, isErpSynced false. On success: audit (category ADMIN), returns {created, updated}. [source: RA e06 + raphe-bulk-import]

nodes.name: Single, implicit, or bulk?
nodes.documentation: Three creation paths. Expression: SINGLE = items module form (permission items.create); IMPLICIT = auto-create triggered when a requisition line itemId is a non-UUID free-typed string (no lookup, Diagram 02; permission inherited from requisition.create); BULK = file upload (permission items.import, POST /api/items/import). All converge on the lifecycle; all default status PENDING_ONBOARDING. [source: RA two creation entries (form OR implicit) + bulk]

nodes.name: Approve item?
nodes.documentation: Expression: APPROVE iff status = PENDING_APPROVAL AND mandatory fields complete (code, description, stockUom, purchaseUom, at least one source priority). Else -> RETURN branch to complete (back to CreateItem), record stays PENDING_APPROVAL. [source: RA item.approve guard]

nodes.name: Post-onboarding lifecycle event
nodes.documentation: Expression: EDIT (any field update) -> revert to PENDING_APPROVAL (isErpSynced reset); SUSPEND (quality stop / obsolescence / supersession) -> SUSPENDED (blocks new ordering of the item without offboarding); OFFBOARD (item retired) -> OFFBOARDED (terminal, soft-delete, retained for history + referencing tickets); otherwise stay ONBOARDED. [source: RA lifecycle + review SUSPENDED state]

nodes.name: All rows valid?
nodes.documentation: Expression: zero accumulated errors -> COMMIT; any error -> throw ONE BadRequestException listing every {rowNumber, reason}, write NOTHING (all-or-nothing); operator fixes the file and re-uploads. [source: RA e06]

nodes.name: New items join lifecycle
nodes.documentation: Implicitly auto-created and bulk-imported items (PENDING_ONBOARDING) merge into the standard lifecycle: each still requires (if not already) source priority + request-approval -> approve to reach ONBOARDED. Convenience routing node joining the happy path. [source: convergence of implicit + bulk into lifecycle]

nodes.name: New item needed
nodes.documentation: Trigger: a buyer/engineer adds a catalog item, a requisition line references an item not yet in the master (implicit auto-create), or a file of items is bulk-loaded. An item follows the same lifecycle as a supplier (PENDING_ONBOARDING -> PENDING_APPROVAL -> ONBOARDED -> OFFBOARDED, plus SUSPENDED). [SCOR OE4 Data/Information | source: RA item onboarding (08) + data-model Item]

nodes.name: Item ONBOARDED / OFFBOARDED
nodes.documentation: Terminal: item is ONBOARDED (orderable), SUSPENDED (blocked, reversible), or OFFBOARDED (terminal). ONBOARDED items feed requisition lines (Diagram 02), PO lines (Diagram 05), and GRN (Diagram 08). [source: build-new]
